name: Data Pipeline
description: Agent fetches data from a simulated SQL database, transforms it, and pushes the result to a simulated ERP endpoint. Tests integration depth and tool-chaining capability.
researchContext: Tests whether the stateful architecture outperforms the baseline in multi-step integration tasks requiring DB and ERP access.

tools.name: sql_query
tools.description: Execute a SQL SELECT query. Input: {"query": "<SQL string>"}. Returns JSON rows.

tools.name: transform_data
tools.description: Transform raw SQL rows into ERP-compatible format. Input: {"rows": [...]}. Returns transformed payload.

tools.name: erp_push
tools.description: Push transformed data to the ERP system via REST. Input: {"payload": {...}}. Returns {"status": "ok"} on success.

initialContext: Retrieve all pending orders (status='pending') from the orders table, transform them to the ERP format (fields: order_id, customer_name, total_eur), and push the result to the ERP system. Confirm success.
expectedFinalAnswer: All pending orders have been successfully pushed to the ERP system.
